title: Merck, Nike Among 14 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In The Second Half Of November
text: There were a few double-digit boosts in the first half of November. Most notably, ADP came through with a 20% increase and Snap-On Tools with a 14% increase. Emerson extended its dividend growth streak to 66 years with a 1% boost and Lancaster Colony started its 7th decade of dividend growth with a 6% increase.

title: Buy These 5 Stocks That Recently Announced Dividend Hikes
text: American Financial Group (AFG), Berkshire Hills Bancorp (BHLB), Snap-on (SNA), Northern Oil and Gas (NOG) and Service Corporation International (SCI) recently hiked dividends.

title: Analyzing Snap-On's Dividend Growth Potential
text: Snap-On (SNA) is the featured stock from October's Dividend Growth Stocks Model Portfolio.

title: Daily Dividend Report: Snap-On, Capital One Financial, Hershey, UnitedHealth Group, Dominion Energy
text: Daily Dividend Report: Snap-On, Capital One Financial, Hershey, UnitedHealth Group, Dominion Energy

title: Snap-On raises dividend, to boost implied yield above 2.9%
text: Snap-On Inc. SNA, +0.30% said Friday it is raising its quarterly dividend by 14.1%, to $1.62 a share from $1.42 a share. The maker of tools, diagnostics and repair information systems' new dividend will be payable Dec. 9 to shareholders of record on Nov. 21.
